# WhatSEO.ai

> AI-powered SEO analysis delivering professional-grade audits in minutes.

WhatSEO.ai is an AI-powered SEO audit platform that analyzes websites across 47 criteria in 7 categories. It provides instant homepage scans for free and comprehensive multi-page audits for businesses that need the full picture.

## Services

- **Free Scan**: Instant homepage analysis across 47 SEO criteria with score and top issues.
- **Professional Audit ($499)**: Full site crawl of up to 500 pages with real Google Search Console data, GA4 integration, professional PDF report, prioritized action plan, and dev-ready code components.
- **Monthly Monitor ($299/mo)**: Recurring audits with trend tracking, Slack notifications, and competitor monitoring.

## Analysis Categories

1. Technical SEO (crawlability, indexability, security, redirects)
2. On-Page SEO (title tags, meta descriptions, headings, internal links)
3. Schema Markup (JSON-LD detection, validation, generation)
4. Performance (Core Web Vitals, PageSpeed Insights, load optimization)
5. Content Quality (E-E-A-T signals, readability, authority indicators)
6. AI Search Readiness (llms.txt, AI crawler access, citability)
7. Images (alt text, formats, responsive images, lazy loading)

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://whatseo.vercel.app
- SEO Audit Service: https://whatseo.vercel.app/services/seo-audit
